orchestrator.description: Task lifecycle coordinator. Reads kanban, creates feature branches, delegates to builder+guardian. Never writes code.

builder.description: Implementation agent. Writes code, fixes bugs, creates tests. Works on feature branches only.

guardian.description: Security and compliance auditor. OWASP Top 10, GDPR, DORA, PSD2 checks. Read-only.

validator.description: Build and test gate. Runs npm/Maven pipelines sequentially, stops on first failure.

reviewer.description: PR creation agent. Always the last step after validator passes.

project-scout.description: Backlog analysis agent. Finds TODOs, FIXMEs, incomplete features. Proposes tasks — never writes to kanban.

history-mapper.description: Maps git history and docs into kanban task files with status: done. Normalizes to English.

lang-enforcer.description: Detects and fixes non-English content. Never touches i18n/locales translation files.
